problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
